title: codereview pass 1/3 post-chunk2: hash_32(EUI-64,0) may collide more than CRC16; add note on DAD retry strategy
description: P2 codereview finding: Changing from CRC16 to 32bit hash truncated to 16bit increases collision probability in self-assignment. Update DAD pseudocode in 02-physical-link.md to recommend more retries or better mixing (e.g. include DODAGID in hash). File as codereview bead for project-LICHEN-9qjs. Do not close main issue yet.
close_reason: Added comprehensive note on hash_32(EUI-64,0) collision probability + updated DAD retry strategy (seed mixing, exponential backoff, 8 probes) in spec/02-physical-link.md:197. Synced refs in 06-security.md:445. Filed+fixed 3 codereview beads (sgxl P2, 55lh P3, tidp P4). Performed 3 review passes with all findings addressed and 2 subsequent clean verification passes (no new P0-P2). Updated pseudocode, cross-refs to file:line (02a:119, link_ctx.c:96 etc), test vectors tie-in. All per task instructions.
